scripts.hosting:preview: npm run build && npx --yes firebase-tools hosting:channel:deploy preview
scripts.hosting:preview:construction: VITE_UNDER_CONSTRUCTION=true npm run build && node scripts/prepare-construction-index.mjs && npx --yes firebase-tools hosting:channel:deploy construction
scripts.hosting:deploy: npm run build && npx --yes firebase-tools deploy --only hosting
scripts.hosting:deploy:construction: VITE_UNDER_CONSTRUCTION=true npm run build && node scripts/prepare-construction-index.mjs && npx --yes firebase-tools deploy --only hosting
